title: BLUELIGHT RAT: Browser Spawning Suspicious Child Process
description: Detects Internet Explorer spawning command interpreters or script hosts. After exploiting CVE-2020-1380 or CVE-2021-26411, BLUELIGHT uses iexplore.exe to spawn cmd.exe, powershell.exe, or wscript.exe for second-stage payload execution.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Event ID' = 1 and 'Parent Process Name' like '*\\iexplore.exe' and ('Process Name' like '*\\cmd.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\powershell.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\wscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\mshta.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\cscript.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\\rundll32.exe')))
falsepositives: Browser helper objects launching legitimate utilities
